addons.name: MCP add-on for 4SEO
addons.short_description: Adds Claude tools for 4SEO meta tags, redirects, JSON-LD, sitemap, and Business Profile management.
addons.notes: Detached from the core in v2.0 — download link populated once the live catalog endpoint is online.
